title.zh: 人面彘身、预告大水的食人兽
title.en: The Human-Faced Swine That Eats Men and Heralds the Deluge

summary.zh: 剡山的凶兽：猪身人面，黄身赤尾，啼声如婴儿；既吃人也吃虫蛇，它一出现，天下就发大水。
summary.en: A monster of Yan Mountain: a pig's body with a human face, yellow with a red tail, crying like an infant. It eats men as well as insects and snakes, and its appearance brings floods across the world.

description.zh:
东次四经的剡山多金玉。山中有兽名合窳：身子是一头猪，脸却是人脸，黄色的身躯拖一条赤红尾巴，发出的声音像婴儿啼哭。经文对它的食性交代得少见地具体：“食人，亦食虫蛇”——人肉与虫豸蛇蝎同列食谱，来者不拒。而它的现身预告着最大尺度的灾难：“见则天下大水。”

人面兽在《山海经》中自成谱系，而“音如婴儿”又是食人兽最常用的诱饵式特征：北次二经的狍鸮、东次二经的蠪蛭都以婴啼掩杀机，合窳是这一族在东方的代表。朱獳的兆应只落在“其国”，合窳引来的大水却漫过“天下”；山间一头怪猪现身，四海河川随之失序，这是东山经诸兆里最沉重的一档。

同在东次四经，太山的蜚见则天下大疫，女烝之山的薄鱼见则天下大旱。大水、大疫、大旱在相邻的山头一字排开，东次四经几乎是一部灾难预警的目录，合窳占据其中水灾的一席。
description.en:
Yan Mountain, in the fourth eastern guideway, is rich in gold and jade. Its beast is the heyu: the body of a pig under a human face, yellow-bodied with a scarlet tail, its voice the crying of an infant. The text is unusually specific about its diet: 'it eats men, and also eats insects and snakes' — human flesh sharing the menu with vermin, nothing refused. And its appearance announces catastrophe at the largest scale the book uses: 'when it is seen, there are great floods under heaven.'

Human-faced beasts form a lineage of their own in the classic, and an infant's cry is the man-eater's favourite lure: the paoxiao of the northern guideways and the longzhi of the eastern second guideway both mask their appetites with a baby's wail. The heyu is the family's eastern representative. Note the magnitude of its omen — the zhuru's panic touches only 'its state', but the heyu's flood covers 'all under heaven'. A strange pig on one mountain, and the whole world's rivers rise: no eastern portent carries a heavier charge.

Its neighbours in the same guideway complete the set: the fei of Tai Mountain brings universal pestilence, the bo fish of Nüzheng Mountain universal drought. Flood, plague, and drought stand on adjacent summits — the fourth eastern guideway reads like a catalogue of early warnings, with the heyu holding the seat for water.

value.en: Pig's body, human face, yellow with a red tail
Its appearance brings floods under heaven

sources.zh: 《山海经·东山经》（东次四经·剡山）
sources.en: Classic of Mountains and Seas, 'Eastern Mountains' (Yan Mountain)
